required_preferences.fact: Coordinates more extensive evening care and rehabilitation support for his mother-in-law, frequently enlisting his wife, hired aides, or therapists—no longer insists on personally handling all assistance himself

supersedes.fact: Always checks in on his mother-in-law each evening—never delegates her care to someone else

required_preferences.fact: Keeps his phone by the bedside in sleep mode for CPAP-related alerts—no longer charges all devices outside the bedroom overnight

supersedes.fact: Charges devices overnight outside the bedroom—never keeps phones or laptops by his bedside

required_preferences.fact: Joins informal after-work happy hours with colleagues on office days—never participated in these before the mandatory on-site policy
Watches soccer matches with his kids—never watches alone or skips their favorite team’s games
Uses guided meditation apps for stress—never tries in-person yoga classes
Explores new Chicago neighborhoods with his wife—never repeats the same weekend itinerary twice in a row

persona: A mid-level sales manager at a multinational pharmaceutical company
